hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“The fastest good to be rewarded is righteousness.” (by Allah {SWT} in the Hereafter) 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.379 •Ghurar Al -Hikam, Vol.1 p.219 • Uyun Al -Hikam, 
Vol.1 p.141  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5803
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٣

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.ar: 5805 - إ ِن  َّ مِن َّ إَّلس ِّعْزِ لَّحِكْمَّه ً وَّ إ ِن  َّ مِن َّ إَّلْن َّي َّان ِ لَّسِحْزإً
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“Muslims are bound by their agreements.” (that they make to others)  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.379 • Awali Al -La’ali, Vol.2 p.258 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, 
Vol.21 p.73 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.2 p.277  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5804
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٤

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.ar: 5806 - إِرْجَّمْ مَّن ْ ق ِى  إَّلْأ َّرْض ِ ي َّزْجَّمْك َّ مَّن ْ ق ِى  إَّلس َّمَّاءِ
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“Indeed, some poetry contains wisdom, and indeed, some speech has a magical 
effect.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.379  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5805
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٥

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“Show mercy to those on the earth, and the One (Allah {SWT}) in the heavens will show 
mercy to you.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.379 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.311  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5806
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٦

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.ar: 5808 - إَّلْعَّان ِذُّ ق ِى  هِن َّي ِهِ كَّالْعَّان ِذِ ق ِى  ق َّي ْن ِهِ
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said; “Whoever is killed defending his wealth is a martyr.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Shihab Al -Akhbar, Vol.1 p.145 • Awali Al -La’ali, 
Vol.1 p.38 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.15 p.122 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.15 p.122 • Al-Fusul Al-Muhimmah, Vol.2 
p.211 • Al-Fusul Al-Muhimmah, Vol.2 p.522 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.29 p.407 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.18 
p.197  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5807
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٧

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“The one who takes back his gift is like the one who returns to his vomit.”  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Bihar Al -Anwar, Vol. 100 p.189 • Mustadrak Al -
Wasa’il, Vol.14 p.72  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5808
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٨

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“It is not permissible for a believer to abandon his believing brother for more than three 
days.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.162 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.72 
p.189 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.9 p.98  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5809
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٠٩

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“Whoever does not show mercy (to others) will not be shown mercy (by Allah {SWT} in 
the Hereafter).” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 •Ghurar Al -Hikam, Vol.1 p.601 • Uyun Al -Hikam, 
Vol.1 p.444  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5810
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٠

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said; “Regret (of a sin) is (a form of) repentance.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Tuhaf Al-’Uqul, Vol.1 p.55 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 
p.8 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.292 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.74 p.159  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5811
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١١

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“The child is attributed to the (lawful) bed, and for the adulterer, there is stone (hadd).” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Al-Majazat Al-Nabawiyyah, Vol.1 p.140 • Al-Masa’il 
Al-Saghamiyyah, Vol.1 p.31 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.121 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.2 p.132 • Awali Al-La’ali, 
Vol.2 p.275 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.33 p.521 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.101 p.64 • Tafsir Nur Al -Thaqalayn, Vol.5 
p.217 • Tafsir Kanz Al-Daqaiq, Vol.13 p.32  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5812
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٢

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“The one who guides to good is like the one who does it.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Thawab Al -A’mal wa Iqab Al -A’mal, Vol.1 p.1 • 
Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.29 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.16 p.123 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.16 p.173 • Bihar Al-
Anwar, Vol.93 p.175 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.7 p.208  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5813
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٣

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“Your love for something blinds and deafens you.” (to its faults and catches)  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Al-Majazat Al-Nabawiyyah, Vol.1 p.171 • Shihab Al-
Akhbar, Vol.1 p.71 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.124 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.290  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5814
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٤

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“He does not (rightfully) thank Allah {SWT}, who does not thank people.” (for doing good 
onto him) 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.339 • Al-Amali (Lil-Tusi), 
Vol.1 p.383 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.16 p.313  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5815

reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٥

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said; “ No one shelters the misguided except the 
misguided.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Awali Al -La’ali, Vol.3 p.484 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, 
Vol.25 p.441  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5816
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٦

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.ar: 5818 - إَّلْأ َّرْوَّإحُّ ج ُّن ُّوذ  مُّح َّن  َّذَّة   ق َّمَّا ي َّعَّارَّف َّ مِن ْهَّا إِن ْي َّلَّف َّ وَّ مَّا ي َّن َّاكَّزَّ مِن ْهَّا إِج ْي َّلَّف
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said; “Protect yourselves from the Fire, even if it is with half 
a date.” (showing the enormous merits of even the modest acts of Charity or ‘Sadaqa’) 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.316 • Majmu’at Warram, 
Vol.1 p.3 • Al-Wafi, Vol.26 p.165   
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5817
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٧

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
"The souls are like recruited soldiers; those that recognize one another will find 
harmony, and those that do not will be in discord." (regarding spiritual affinity between 
individuals) 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Al-I’tiqadat, Vol.1 p.48 • Al-Masa’il Al-Sarwiyyah, 
Vol.1 p.37 • Al-Masa’il Al-Sarwiyyah, Vol.1 p.53 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.89 • Jami’ Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.171 
• Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.1 p.288 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.2 p.265 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.5 p.261 • Bihar Al-Anwar, 
Vol.58 p.63  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5818
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٨

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“The delay in (due) payment by a wealthy person is injustice.”  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.16 • Muhasabat Al-Nafs, 
Vol.1 p.33 • Awali Al -La’ali, Vol.4 p.72 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.18 p.333 • Bihar Al -Anwar, Vol.72 p.231 • 
Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.13 p.397 • Mustadrak Al-Wasa’il, Vol.13 p.397  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5819
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨١٩

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said; “Travel (discomforts) is a portion of torment.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Shihab Al-Akhbar, Vol.1 p.72  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5820
reference.chapter: AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٢٠

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said; “People are like mines, just as gold and silver mines.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.4 p.380 • Shihab Al -Akhbar, Vol. 1 p.66 • Bihar Al -Anwar, 
Vol.58 p.65 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.58 p.106  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5821

reference.location: Volume 4 › AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٧٦، ح ٥٨٢١

hadiths.chapter: 176. AMONG THE CONCISE WORDS OF THE MESSENGER
hadiths.ar: 5823 - إُّجْي ُّوإ ق ِى  وُّج ُّوةِ إَّلْمَّذ َّإجِي ن َّ إَّلي  ُّزَّإب
hadiths.en:
The Prophet {saws} said;  
“The host of a gathering has the most right to the forefront of his gathering.” 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.4 p.380  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 4, Ch. 176, H. 5822
